title: Attestation
description: Truth primitive: cryptographically signed proof that an obligation was satisfied. Append-only ledger entry. RSM v0.1 compliant.

attestation_id.description: Unique identifier for this attestation (uuid or content hash).

run_id.description: Links this attestation to a specific governance run. SIGNED FIELD.

claim_id.description: Links this attestation to a specific claim. SIGNED FIELD.

obligation_name.description: Must match an obligation name from the briefcase. SIGNED FIELD.

attestor_id.description: Unique attestor identifier (role instance, not person). E.g., 'ci_runner_001'. SIGNED FIELD.

attestor_class.description: Function-based attestor class (RSM v0). Determines quorum-by-class rules. SIGNED FIELD.

policy_hash.description: Pinned policy version hash. Ensures attestation is bound to specific governance rules. SIGNED FIELD.

key_registry_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the key registry when attestation was signed. Ensures registry-bound verification. SIGNED FIELD.

evidence_digest.description: SHA256 of canonical evidence payload. NO_RECEIPT = NO_SHIP if missing. SIGNED FIELD.

signing_key_id.description: Public key identifier for signature verification and revocation. E.g., 'key-2026-01-ci-prod'. NOT SIGNED (meta).

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over canonical signed fields. Format: 'ed25519:' + base64(signature_bytes).

policy_match.description: Binary satisfaction: 1 iff obligation is satisfied, 0 otherwise. NO soft values. SIGNED FIELD.

evidence_uri.description: Pointer to stored evidence artifact. NOT SIGNED (informational only).

evidence_type.description: Evidence format identifier (e.g., pytest-junit, compliance-signoff). NOT SIGNED (informational only).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when attestation was created. NOT SIGNED (replay determinism).

meta.description: Optional non-sovereign metadata. NOT SIGNED. Never changes satisfaction semantics.

canonical_signed_message.description: Fields included in signature computation. Order enforced by canonical JSON (sort_keys=True).

signature_algorithm.description: Only Ed25519 signatures are accepted. Algorithm is fixed for determinism.
